title: austrostipa mollis
intro: Austrostipa mollis, also known as the soft needle grass, is a type of perennial grass native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Austrostipa mollis include its ability to reduce fever, soothe wounds, and ease respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and poultices, although its use should be carefully considered and guided by a qualified healthcare professional due to potential interactions with other medications.
